title: LeaveMyCamera
body:
## What is this mod?
This is a very simple and lightweight mod that allows you to detach the camera from your character and leave it in place while you walk away. It's useful for content creators who are recording videos.

## Additional info
* While the camera is detached, you can't freely look around, instead your character will move
* The mod does **not** allow flying or interacting with the world from the detached camera, but you can still interact from your character while camera detached
